title: Analytics - Firmware Update Completed
scenario: Verify that after a successful DFU completion, the Firebase event page displays default analytics elements plus DFU-specific fields (device PID, charge unit PID, update type, target language ID) and event counts increase after a few hours.
steps: 1. Perform a successful DFU (Device Firmware Update).
2. Navigate to the Firebase event page.
3. Verify that the page displays default elements: graph, events in last 30 minutes, event count by country/gender, events per session, app version, app build, app environment.
4. Verify that the page also displays additional elements: device PID, charge unit PID, update type, and target language ID.
5. Wait a few hours after the successful DFU.
6. Check that event counts for the related elements have increased.
expected: The Firebase event page shows default elements (graph, events in last 30 minutes, event count by country/gender, events per session, app version, app build, app environment) plus device PID, charge unit PID, update type, and target language ID. After a few hours, event counts for related elements increase.
